about.title: My Background
about.subtitle: Discover my journey, core values, and what drives my engineering philosophy.
about.philosophyDesc: I believe software is as much about aesthetics and design constraints as it is about scalable algorithms. True craft lies in code elegance, comprehensive type safety, and respectful, swift accessibility of interfaces.
about.valuesDesc1: Uncompromising quality checks and strict adherence to specifications.
about.valuesDesc2: Responsive support, deep collaborative communication, and perpetual learning mindset.
about.objectivesDesc: Seeking an impactful position as a junior software engineer inside an innovative tech startup or engineering team where code-quality, performance-first and architectural standards matter.

contact.title: Start a Conversation
contact.subtitle: Fill in the interface below, and the message will sync with my custom MongoDB store and alert me via Resend email.

contact.fillFields: Please fill in all the message fields fully.
contact.dbConnectFailed: Failed to connect to the database pipeline.

gemini.title: AI Recruitment Agent
gemini.intro: Hi, I am AI Grégoire, a custom virtual representation of Grégoire Batcho. Powered by Gemini, I have absolute access to his credentials, experiences, and calendar stats. How can I assist your recruitment process?
gemini.syncing: I am currently syncing. Try again.
gemini.errorMsg: My apologies! I failed to sync with the Gemini engine. Please drop a brief line to Grégoire at batchogregoire0@gmail.com!
gemini.analyzing: AI Grégoire is analyzing code repositories...

admin.loginSub: Unlock the database systems of Grégoire BATCHO's portfolio.
admin.integrityDesc: All portfolio sections are compiled via an active MongoDB Atlas pipeline with atomic operations. Every change submitted dynamically rebuilds local cache arrays, ensuring instantaneous responses.
